description: Experience the joy of Christmas with our festive email template specially designed for promotions and fundraisers focused on pets. Perfect for the holiday season, this template beautifully incorporates elements of a Christmas tree, bringing the warmth and cheer of the season to your campaign. Whether you're offering special deals for pets or organizing a seasonal promotion, this template can effectively convey your message. It's not just for pet owners, but also for those who love the holiday season and want to contribute to a cause. This versatile template is a fantastic way to engage with your audience during the Christmas holidays.
short_description: Experience the joy of Christmas with our festive email template, perfect for pet promotions and fundraisers. Featuring elements of a Christmas tree, it brings holiday warmth to your campaigns. Ideal for special deals for pets, seasonal promotions, and engaging audiences during the holiday season.

designer.description: I’m a growth marketing manager with a strong copywriting and ideation background. I enjoy working to make a thought or vision come to life!

html_data:
OPERATION

Santa Paws

Every year thousands of pets spend the holidays at shelters patiently waiting for their forever home. They don't ask for much out of you except love (and maybe a few treats). As you consider adding a furry friend to your family for the holidays, we encourage you to check your local shelters first. Not ready for a pet but still want to help? Many shelters need volunteers during the holiday season and can always use more supplies! 

Find Shelters
 

Special deals for our furry friends that made the nice list!

 
 

Pet Food 10% off

Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit, sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore et dolore magna aliqua. 

Browse Food
 
 

$50 Off Cat Trees

Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit, sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore et dolore magna aliqua. 

Browse Cat Trees
 
 
 
 
 
 

BOGO Treats

Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit, sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore et dolore magna aliqua. 

Browse Treats
 

Help us give back to a local shelter this holiday!

This holiday season every purchase you make will give a pet in a shelter another meal, a few treats, or a brand new toy. We pledge to donate 25% of all profits made December 1st - December 25th to shelters in our area. Thank you for your support and happy shopping!

 
Start Shopping
 

Holiday Delivery Times

Due to nationwide shipping delays, we kindly ask that all orders be placed by December 15th in order to guarantee delivery by Christmas Eve. Any orders placed after December 15th are not guaranteed to arrive before Christmas.

Place Order
 
 

Holiday Hours

Monday-Saturday: 8 - 5

Sunday: 10 - 3 

Christmas Eve: 8 - 12

Christmas Day: Closed

 

 
 

Where to find us

1111 Street

City, State Zip Code

 

Changed your mind? Unsubscribe
